Class StillEntity

java.lang.Object
ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.StillEntity
Direct Known Subclasses:
Coin, EscapeGate, Food, Trap
public class StillEntity extends Object
Represents a stationary entity in the game world, such as walls, coins, food, or traps. It has a fixed position and can be checked for collisions with tiles or other entities.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected Position
    position
    The position of this entity in the game world.

    Constructs a StillEntity at the specified position.

  • Field Details

    • position

      protected Position position
      The position of this entity in the game world.

  • Constructor Details

    • StillEntity

      public StillEntity(Position position)
      Constructs a StillEntity at the specified position.
      Parameters:
      position - the position of the entity; must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the position is null

    • StillEntity

      public StillEntity(int x, int y)
      Alternative constructor to create a StillEntity using x and y coordinates.
      Parameters:
      x - the x-coordinate (column)
      y - the y-coordinate (row)

  • Method Details

    • getPosition

      public Position getPosition()
      Returns the current position of this entity.
      Returns:
      the entity's position

    • setPosition

      public void setPosition(Position p)
      Sets the position of this entity.
      Parameters:
      p - the new position; must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the position is null

    • intersects

      public boolean intersects(int px, int py, int tileSize)
      Checks whether this entity intersects with a square tile at the given coordinates. Uses Axis-Aligned Bounding Box (AABB) collision detection.
      Parameters:
      px - the x-coordinate of the other tile
      py - the y-coordinate of the other tile
      tileSize - the size of the tile
      Returns:
      true if this entity intersects with the tile, false otherwise

    • blocksMovement

      public boolean blocksMovement()
      Checks whether this entity blocks player or enemy movement. Subclasses can override this to define their own behavior.
      Returns:
      false by default (does not block movement)

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string with the entity type and its position.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a string representation of this entity
